comments.title: 🔥偏离拟合价52%，大摩ETF捡筹码？
comments.body:
BTC 在 $70,866 附近横盘，7日微跌 0.9%，但 AHR999 已悄然跌至 0.37，进入“抄底区”。数据揭示了一个惊人的事实：当前价格偏离拟合价格 $149,459 高达 -52.6%，即便对比 200日成本 $91,772 也低了 -22.8%。这种估值层面的深度折价，与 MVRV 1.31 的低位形成了双重安全垫。
市场还在犹豫，摩根士丹利现货 ETF 却已蓄势待发。当传统金融巨头准备入场，而链上模型显示价格处于历史性低估区间，这究竟是市场失效，还是暴风雨前最后的“打折窗口”？
comments.title_en: 🔥 Off by 52% from Fit Price? Morgan Stanley ETF Snatching Up Chips?
comments.body_en:
BTC is hovering around $70,866, with a 0.9% decline over 7 days, but AHR999 has quietly dropped to 0.37, entering the "bottom-fishing zone." Data reveals a stunning fact: the current price is 52.6% below the fit price of $149,459, even lower than the 200-day cost of $91,772 by -22.8%. This deep discount at the valuation level is paired with a dual safety cushion of MVRV 1.31 at a low level.
The market is still hesitating, but Morgan Stanley's spot ETF is already poised and ready. As the traditional financial giant prepares to enter the scene, and on-chain models show that prices are in a historically undervalued range, is this market failure, or the last "discount window" before the storm?
